ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the accident occurred */,
  "accident_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the accident */,
  "accident_type" TEXT /* Type of accident (e.g., collision, pedestrian, cyclist) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the accident (e.g., fatal, injury, property damage) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident (e.g., sunny, rainy, foggy) */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident (e.g., dry, wet, icy) */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions at the time of the accident (e.g., daylight, darkness, street lights) */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the accident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Who reported the accident (e.g., police, witness, driver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, urban, rural) */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit at the location */,
  "traffic_signal" INTEGER /* Presence of traffic signals */,
  "crosswalk" INTEGER /* Presence of crosswalks */,
  "public_transportation" INTEGER /* Presence of public transportation facilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_involvements" (
  "involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each involvement */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party involved (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party involved */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the party in the accident (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  "injury_status" INTEGER /* Whether the party was injured */,
  "safety_equipment" TEXT /* Safety equipment used (e.g., seatbelt, helmet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("involvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_involvements_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_involvements_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_involvements_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "registered_owner" TEXT /* Name of the registered owner */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* Insurance company of the vehicle */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vehicle inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the party */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the party */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number (if applicable) */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributing factor (e.g., speeding, distraction, weather) */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor */,
  "factor_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the contributing factor (e.g., 1 for minor, 5 for major) */,
  "factor_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the factor (e.g., witness statements, surveillance footage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_factors_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., head, chest, leg) */,
  "injury_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the injury (e.g., left arm, right leg) */,
  "injury_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received for the injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, permanent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_injuries_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic volume record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the traffic volume measurement */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume (e.g., number of vehicles per hour) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "traffic_flow" TEXT /* Direction of traffic flow (e.g., northbound, southbound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_volume_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety measure */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of safety measure (e.g., speed camera, traffic signal) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the safety measure was implemented */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the safety measure */,
  "measure_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of implementing the safety measure */,
  "measure_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Effectiveness of the safety measure (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the safety measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_measures_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
